dailyNews.title: As Iran claims downing second F-35 fighter jet, here is a look at US military aircraft lost during Operation Epic Fury
dailyNews.description: US military assets worth up to $2.9 billion have been lost as the Pentagon seeks $200 billion for operations. Iran asserts it shot down a US F-35, contradicting US Central Command's claim of an emergency landing. The conflict leads to significant military losses on both sides.

dailyNews.title: When will the Iran war end? Tracing the Trump administration's timelines
dailyNews.description: Experts say many US presidents have offered a timeline for a conflict - only to then shift their estimates.

dailyNews.title: President Donald Trump briefed on downed F-15 fighter jet in Iran
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has been briefed on reports and imagery suggesting a US F-15 may have been downed over Iran, a potential first in the conflict.

dailyNews.title: ICE detains president of Wisconsin's largest mosque, alleging he hid conviction for attacks on Israelis
dailyNews.description: Federal authorities detain Wisconsin's largest mosque president, alleging he concealed past conviction in Israel and lied on his immigration application.

dailyNews.title: Grammy Award-winning rapper set to play professional basketball in China
dailyNews.description: Rapper J. Cole announced he will play professional basketball in China with the Nanjing Monkey Kings of the Chinese Basketball Association this season.

dailyNews.title: William Shatner slams AI fake news claiming he's dying, had heated Erika Kirk confrontation
dailyNews.description: William Shatner called out a Facebook page for using AI to spread fake stories about him having brain cancer and dying. He urged fans to be skeptical of "bizarre" claims about him.

dailyNews.title: NY prosecutor sidesteps sanctuary law and coordinates ICE arrest of Guatemalan child rape suspect
dailyNews.description: A New York prosecutor used a legal loophole to coordinate an ICE arrest of a suspected child rapist, bypassing the state's sanctuary and no-bail policies.

dailyNews.title: Dem lawmaker busted on camera slipping into bash with reality TV stars as Americans feel shutdown pain
dailyNews.description: Democrat Rep. Seth Magaziner was caught sneaking into a "Real Housewives of Rhode Island" watch party amid the government shutdown before Easter travel.

dailyNews.title: State top cop moves to crush alleged DHS records restriction as county denies ICE-out
dailyNews.description: Montana AG tells Gallatin County its refusal to recognize ICE as a criminal justice agency is legally wrong, warning 'Montana is not California.'

dailyNews.description: From Iran to China, President Trump’s global aggression has encouraged other countries to search for new ways to pressure the U.S. economy.

dailyNews.title: Pam Bondi Wanted a Graceful Exit. But Trump Wanted Her Gone.
dailyNews.description: Pam Bondi had a feeling her days as attorney general were numbered. But she didn’t expect President Trump to drop the curtain quite so soon.

dailyNews.title: Who Is Todd Blanche, Trump’s Acting Attorney General?
dailyNews.description: While it remains unclear how long Todd Blanche will stay in the job, whoever ends up taking over permanently will lead a department that he has shaped in his own image.

dailyNews.title: Liberal Group Warns That Trump Could Have Two More Supreme Court Picks
dailyNews.description: Demand Justice plans to tie Republicans running for Senate this year to a possible fight to fill vacancies that could emerge on the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: The Awe of a Moon Launch in an Age of Trump, Turmoil and Tribal Divisions
dailyNews.description: The launch of Artemis II captured the tenor of the times in a country that can still do big things but seems forever mired in big problems.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure, saying its government 'knows what has to be done'
dailyNews.description: The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump was said to be unhappy with Pam Bondi's handling of DOJ files about Jeffrey Epstein and the DOJ's failure to prosecute his political enemies.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's Iran speech ignores the risks of a return to the 1970s
dailyNews.description: Oil shocks crippled past presidencies. The Iran war is putting Trump into the danger zone.

dailyNews.title: One year on from Trump's 'liberation day,' global investors are rethinking American exceptionalism
dailyNews.description: U.S. exceptionalism is "no longer automatic" among global investors, one market watcher told CNBC.

dailyNews.title: Pam Bondi Responds After Trump Fires Her as Attorney General
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced on Thursday that he has fired Pam Bondi as Attorney General and said she will be transitioning to a “new job in the private sector.” Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche, who once served as Trump’s personal defense lawyer during his hush money trial in New York, is set to replace her as acting attorney general. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports and Kristen Welker, moderator of Meet the Press, joins TODAY with analysis.

dailyNews.title: Evangelical churches who backed Trump now feel like 'collateral' in his deportation agenda
dailyNews.description: Amid ICE arrests and detentions, attendance has dropped and churches have closed. 'You're deporting the future of American Christianity,' a Latino evangelical leader said.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: US jet appears to have been shot down by Iran, US official says
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
